  "problem_method_insight": "A lightweight channel attention module can be inserted into a ResNet-18 block path with minimal parameter overhead, enabling an isolated test of whether attention improves CIFAR-10 classification without increasing inference latency.",
  "proposed_method_summary": "Compare ResNet-18 (baseline) against ResNet-18 augmented with one lightweight channel attention module inserted after the second residual block. Train both arms on CIFAR-10 under a fixed optimizer, augmentation, and epoch budget across three random seeds. Measure top-1 accuracy and per-image inference latency on the target hardware.",
  "condition": "The attention module must be inserted as a single, independently switchable component so that its isolated contribution can be measured against the frozen baseline.",
  "limitation": "Latency results are hardware-dependent and must be measured in the target environment; absolute latency values are not transferable across devices.",
  "mechanism": "Channel attention reweights feature maps along the channel dimension, allowing the network to emphasize informative channels and suppress less useful ones, which may improve classification accuracy wi
